events.title: TechSummit 2026 Conference
events.location: Moscone Center, 747 Howard Street, San Francisco, CA 94103
events.description: Full Conference (3-Day) registration confirmed. Attendance required for all sessions. Day 1 (March 18): 8:00 AM Registration & Breakfast, 9:00 AM Opening Keynote, 10:00 AM-6:00 PM Sessions, 7:00 PM Welcome Reception. Day 2 (March 19): 8:00 AM-6:00 PM Sessions & Workshops, 12:00 PM Networking Lunch. Day 3 (March 20): 8:00 AM-3:00 PM Sessions, 3:00 PM Closing Keynote, 4:00 PM Conference Ends. Attendee: Alex Chen, Registration #: TS2026-78901. Badge pickup at Registration Desk (bring photo ID).
